source_anchors.supports: 27 May 2026 governance playbooks, more than 150 health AI leaders, baseline controls, and eight elements of responsible AI use

source_anchors.supports: four core domains, five organizational process subdomains, and playbook scope for healthcare delivery organizations

source_anchors.name: CHAI Responsible AI Guide page
source_anchors.supports: Responsible AI Guide scope as a healthcare AI playbook with ethics, quality assurance, consensus, and broad stakeholder participation

source_anchors.name: CHAI draft responsible health AI framework release
source_anchors.supports: assurance reporting checklists across lifecycle, public reporting transparency, and responsible health AI framework context

governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Does the public artifact state what it is allowed to support and what it is not allowed to support
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Scope paragraph blocked claim list use boundary public release note

governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Is the responsible reviewer role visible before any safety conclusion
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Reviewer role table route owner map escalation owner placeholder

governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Are staffing review time data access source review and maintenance needs named before field use
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Readiness gap list minimal resource card handoff index

governance_lanes.lane: Responsible AI lifecycle management and use
governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Is there a route from intake to review release correction and retirement
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Release gate issue template changelog correction log

governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Are failure modes affected users likely harm and uncertainty recorded before any public output
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Failure Atlas row no ranking report impact question uncertainty statement

governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Are data source label provenance leakage regulated access and missingness boundaries visible
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Health data quality card label audit row source support note leakage statement

governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Are model vendor benchmark and tool claims kept below endorsement or procurement language
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Benchmark compatibility note source support row blocked wording log

governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Can clinicians and builders learn how to read the artifact without treating it as medical advice
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Clinician AI literacy module feedback route reviewer question worksheet

governance_lanes.lane: Public transparency and no ranking reporting
governance_lanes.public_artifact_question: Does the public output explain risk evidence without ranking models or implying a validated leaderboard
governance_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: No ranking assurance card public wording decision log release boundary
